moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21, 2026, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: Get ready for the longest day of the year! The Summer Solstice officially arrives on Sunday at 9:24 AM BST. How are you making the most of the extra daylight?

angles.name: Sunrise at Stonehenge
angles.copy: Thousands gather at Stonehenge for the Summer Solstice. Will you be among them for Sunday's sunrise, or celebrating the longest day closer to home? The Golowan Festival in Penzance also continues the celebrations until June 28.

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Summer officially kicks off with the Solstice on Sunday! Time for those long evenings, sunshine, and good vibes. What's your favourite summer tune?

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, launched on June 1, 2026, and continues nightly on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing fresh drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Tonight's Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of drama from the Love Island villa! Who's coupling up, who's cracking on, and who's getting dumped? Tune in at 9pm on ITV2.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! What's been your favourite moment of the series so far, and which Islander are you backing to go all the way?

angles.name: Bombshell Alert
angles.copy: More bombshells are shaking up the Love Island villa! Who do you think needs to make a move tonight? Catch it at 9pm on ITV2.

moments.title: Taylor Swift's Latest UK No.1
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift has secured her seventh UK number-one single with 'I Knew It, I Knew You', from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack, topping the chart for the week ending June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is the new UK number one. Have you heard her latest chart-topper from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack?

angles.name: Swiftie Celebration
angles.copy: Massive congrats to Taylor Swift on her 7th UK No.1! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is dominating the airwaves. What's your favourite Taylor Swift number one?

angles.name: Toy Story 5 Hit
angles.copy: Not only is Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' a UK No.1, it's also from the Toy Story 5 soundtrack! A double win for the Swifties.

moments.title: World Cup: Scotland vs Brazil
moments.blurb: Scotland are set to face Brazil in a Group Stage match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 on June 24th, playing at Miami Stadium.

angles.name: Scotland's World Cup Clash
angles.copy: Huge World Cup match coming up for Scotland on June 24th as they take on football giants Brazil in the group stages! Get ready to cheer them on.

angles.name: Scotland vs Brazil
angles.copy: It's Scotland vs Brazil in the World Cup group stage on June 24th! Can the Tartan Army pull off a shock? We'll be watching every kick!

moments.title: World Cup: England vs Panama
moments.blurb: England will play Panama in a Group L match of the FIFA World Cup 2026 on June 27th, live from New York New Jersey Stadium.

angles.name: England's Next Match
angles.copy: The Three Lions are back in World Cup action on June 27th, taking on Panama! Get your shirts ready and let's back England all the way.

angles.name: World Cup Fever
angles.copy: It's England vs Panama next in the World Cup group stage on June 27th! How far do you think England will go in the tournament this year?

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026, the third Grand Slam of the tennis season, officially kicks off on Monday, June 29, running until July 12.

angles.name: Tennis Season in London
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! The Wimbledon Championships begin on June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Who's your pick for the title?

angles.name: Grass Court Action
angles.copy: Wimbledon 2026 starts June 29th! The world's best players are heading to the iconic grass courts. Are you excited for the tennis action?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 20.

angles.name: Lionel's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your favourite song from the 'Hello' hitmaker? We're playing his best all day.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating a true music icon today! Lionel Richie turns 77. From The Commodores to his incredible solo career, his music defines generations.

moments.title: Lana Del Rey's 41st Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lana Del Rey, known for her melancholic and cinematic style, turns 41 on June 21.

angles.name: Lana's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the incredible Lana Del Rey! From 'Video Games' to 'Summertime Sadness', her unique sound continues to captivate.

angles.name: Queen of Melancholy
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 41st Birthday to Lana Del Rey! What's your go-to Lana track?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper Turns 73
moments.blurb: The iconic pop star Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22.

angles.name: Cyndi's Big Day
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to the fabulous Cyndi Lauper! Still having fun and inspiring us all. What's your favourite Cyndi Lauper anthem?

angles.name: Pop Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Cyndi Lauper's 73rd birthday on June 22nd! Her music is truly timeless.

moments.title: Jimmy Somerville is 65
moments.blurb: Jimmy Somerville, the distinctive voice of Bronski Beat and The Communards, turns 65 on June 22.

angles.name: 80s Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the unmistakable Jimmy Somerville! From 'Smalltown Boy' to 'Don't Leave Me This Way', his voice is pure 80s gold.

angles.name: Bronski Beat Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Jimmy Somerville's 65th on June 22nd! A true icon of 80s pop and dance music. What's your top track from him or The Communards?

moments.title: Solange Knowles Turns 40
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Solange Knowles, known for her acclaimed albums and unique R&B sound, celebrates her 40th birthday on June 24.

angles.name: Solange's 40th
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the incredible Solange Knowles! A true artist who constantly pushes boundaries. What's your favourite Solange album?

angles.name: Music and Style Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Solange's 40th on June 24th! Beyond the music, she's a major style icon. What's the Solange track you can't get enough of?

moments.title: Curt Smith of Tears for Fears is 65
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of the iconic band Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday on June 24.

angles.name: Tears for Fears Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Curt Smith of Tears for Fears! From 'Everybody Wants To Rule The World' to 'Shout', his voice is pure 80s magic.

angles.name: Music That Matters
angles.copy: Celebrating Curt Smith's 65th on June 24th! What's your favourite Tears for Fears track that still resonates today?

moments.title: John Illsley of Dire Straits Turns 77
moments.blurb: John Illsley, the acclaimed bassist and co-founder of legendary rock band Dire Straits, celebrates his 77th birthday on June 24.

angles.name: Dire Straits Legend
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to John Illsley, the incredible bassist from Dire Straits! His basslines are iconic. What's your favourite Dire Straits track?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Celebrating John Illsley's 77th on June 24th! A founding member of one of the greatest rock bands ever.

moments.title: Andy McCluskey of OMD is 67
moments.blurb: Andy McCluskey, co-founder and frontman of electronic music pioneers Orchestral Manoeuvres in the Dark (OMD), celebrates his 67th birthday on June 24.

angles.name: OMD's Frontman
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday to Andy McCluskey, the voice of OMD! 'Enola Gay' and 'Souvenir' are just some of their timeless hits. What's your favourite OMD song?

angles.name: Synth-Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Andy McCluskey's 67th on June 24th! A true synth-pop pioneer who shaped the sound of the 80s.

moments.title: Ariana Grande Turns 33
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, celebrates her 33rd birthday on June 26.

angles.name: Ariana's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd Birthday to the one and only Ariana Grande! From 'Thank U, Next' to '7 rings', her anthems dominate the charts.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd on June 26th! What's your ultimate Ariana track that always gets you singing along?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger is 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, former lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Nicole's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the fierce Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls hits to her solo career, she's a true performer.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's 48th on June 29th! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls track that still gets you dancing?

moments.title: Colin Hay of Men at Work Turns 73
moments.blurb: Colin Hay, the distinctive Scottish-Australian frontman of the Grammy-winning band Men at Work, celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Men at Work Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to Colin Hay, the voice of Men at Work! 'Down Under' and 'Who Can It Be Now?' are timeless.

angles.name: Aussie Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Colin Hay's 73rd on June 29th! What's your favourite Men at Work hit that takes you back to the 80s?

moments.title: Ian Paice of Deep Purple is 78
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only continuous member of the rock titans Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on June 29.

angles.name: Deep Purple Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the iconic Ian Paice of Deep Purple! His drumming on tracks like 'Smoke on the Water' is legendary.

angles.name: Rock's Rhythmic Heart
angles.copy: Celebrating Ian Paice's 78th on June 29th! A true powerhouse behind the kit for decades. What's your favourite Deep Purple album?
